description_long: This object is a large, ornate chandelier featuring five upward-curving arms, each holding a candle with a visible wick and flame. The central body is hexagonal and robust, constructed from a dark, matte metal, with each arm extending outward in a stylized, angular fashion. The candles are white and cylindrical, with subtle texturing to suggest wax, and each is topped with a small, flickering flame. The chandelier is suspended from a thick, vertical rod, indicating it is designed to hang from a ceiling. The overall design is both functional and decorative, evoking a classic, slightly rustic aesthetic suitable for urban or historical settings. The structure appears sturdy, with the metal arms and central body providing significant support for the candles.
description: A large, dark metal chandelier with five arms, each holding a white candle with a visible flame. The design is ornate and sturdy, suitable for ceiling suspension in urban or historical interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing three prominent candle arms and the central hexagonal body, with two arms partially visible in the background.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back three candle arms and the robust central body, with the front arms less visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the five candle arms and the vertical suspension rod.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear of the chandelier, with the central rod and the angular arms extending outward.
